name: wandb-driven-dev
description: Experiment-driven development for ML codebases. Hypothesis-first, baseline+variant, smoke-before-full discipline with W&B as the source of truth.

interface.longDescription: Hypothesis-first ML experiment workflow with W&B-backed baselines, smoke gates, launch discipline, run monitoring, and review.
defaultPrompt: Set up experiment-driven development for this repo.
Plan and launch a W&B-backed ablation.
Review an experiment result from W&B runs.
